title: GUI ReVisor addon
description: GUI Revision addon for support Visor mod
body:
# ![ReVisor title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38a356cab672e9f19cf34c76906e4e9d9afd48b6.png)
## EN | About

<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>

This addon for **[GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision)** adds support for **[Visor](https://modrinth.com/mod/visor)** and **[VisorEssentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/visoressentials)**

</details>

## RU | О проекте

<details>
<summary>Раскрыть</summary>

Этот аддон для ресурспака **[GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision)** добавляющий поддержку **[Visor](https://modrinth.com/mod/visor)** и **[VisorEssentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/visoressentials)**

</details>

|---|---|

| ![Visor icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a7e99516acdc557b7afc57d0fcfbf97308c8b54_0.webp) | **[VisorEssentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/visoressentials)** |
| ![GUI Revision icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a18a2d6310eef2fca679e7f317e1a4e6f69ab9e7_0.webp) | **[GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision)** |
|  |  |
